sentences.target: Die Garantie gilt noch zwei Jahre.

translations.de: Die Garantie gilt noch zwei Jahre.
translations.en: The warranty is still valid for two years.
translations.es: La garantía sigue vigente por dos años más.
translations.fr: La garantie est encore valable pendant deux ans.
translations.it: La garanzia è ancora valida per altri due anni.
translations.pt: A garantia ainda é válida por mais dois anos.
translations.vi: Bảo hành vẫn còn hiệu lực thêm hai năm nữa.
translations.ar: الضمان لا يزال ساريًا لعامين إضافيين.
translations.nl: De garantie is nog twee jaar geldig.
translations.hu: A garancia még két évig érvényes.
translations.hi: वारंटी अभी दो साल और मान्य है.
translations.pl: Gwarancja jest ważna jeszcze przez dwa lata.
translations.el: Η εγγύηση ισχύει για άλλα δύο χρόνια.
translations.nb: Garantien gjelder i to år til.
translations.id: Garansi masih berlaku selama dua tahun lagi.
translations.sv: Garantin gäller i ytterligare två år.
translations.ro: Garanția mai este valabilă încă doi ani.
translations.da: Garantien gælder i yderligere to år.
translations.fi: Takuu on voimassa vielä kaksi vuotta.
translations.ja: 保証はあと2年間有効です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, determines 'Garantie' (subject).
Noun; feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; main predicate meaning 'is valid'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate to indicate remaining/continued validity (here: for another period).
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'Jahre'.
Noun; plural accusative used as measure (accusative of duration) indicating how long the validity lasts.

sentences.target: Ich habe noch Garantie auf das Handy.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə nɔx ɡaʁanˈtiː aʊ̯f das ˈhɛndi/

translations.de: Ich habe noch Garantie auf das Handy.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə nɔx ɡaʁanˈtiː aʊ̯f das ˈhɛndi/
translations.en: I still have a warranty on the phone.
translations.es: El teléfono aún está en garantía.
translations.fr: Le téléphone est encore sous garantie.
translations.it: Il telefono è ancora in garanzia.
translations.zh-Hans: 这部手机还在保修期内。
translations.yue: 呢部手機仲喺保養期內。
translations.pt: O telefone ainda está na garantia.
translations.vi: Điện thoại vẫn còn bảo hành.
translations.nl: De telefoon valt nog onder de garantie.
translations.hi: फोन अभी भी वारंटी में है.
translations.el: Το τηλέφωνο είναι ακόμα σε εγγύηση.
translations.ja: この電話はまだ保証期間内です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present; main verb expressing possession.
Adverb; modifies 'habe' to indicate continued possession/coverage.
Noun; mass noun functioning as direct object (accusative) of 'habe'.
Preposition; governs accusative here; introduces a PP specifying the item the warranty applies to.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter, determines 'Handy' within the PP.
Noun; neuter singular; object of the preposition 'auf' (target of coverage).

sentences.target: Er fragt nach der Garantie beim Verkäufer.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ fʁaːkt naːx deːɐ̯ ɡaʁanˈtiː baɪ̯m fɛɐ̯ˈkɔʏ̯fɐ/

translations.de: Er fragt nach der Garantie beim Verkäufer.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ fʁaːkt naːx deːɐ̯ ɡaʁanˈtiː baɪ̯m fɛɐ̯ˈkɔʏ̯fɐ/
translations.en: He asks the seller about the warranty.
translations.es: Le pregunta al vendedor por la garantía.
translations.fr: Il demande au vendeur des détails sur la garantie.
translations.it: Chiede al venditore informazioni sulla garanzia.
translations.zh-Hans: 他向售货员询问保修情况。
translations.yue: 佢問售貨員有關保養嘅情況。
translations.ru: Он спрашивает у продавца о гарантии.
translations.pt: Ele pergunta ao vendedor sobre a garantia.
translations.he: הוא שואל את המוכר לגבי האחריות.
translations.vi: Anh ấy hỏi người bán về bảo hành.
translations.nl: Hij vraagt de verkoper naar de garantie.
translations.hi: वह विक्रेता से वारंटी के बारे में पूछता है.
translations.el: Ρωτά τον πωλητή για την εγγύηση.
translations.id: Dia bertanya kepada penjual tentang garansi.
translations.ro: Îl întreabă pe vânzător despre garanție.
translations.ja: 彼は店員に保証について尋ねます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; main predicate.
Preposition; governs dative; marks the topic being asked about.
Definite article; dative singular feminine, determines 'Garantie' after 'nach'.
Noun; feminine singular; object of 'nach' in dative.
Preposition (fused form of 'bei dem'); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Noun; masculine singular; dative object of 'beim' (location/person asked).

sentences.target: Die Uhr hat keine Garantie mehr.

translations.de: Die Uhr hat keine Garantie mehr.
translations.en: The watch has no warranty anymore.
translations.es: El reloj ya no tiene garantía.
translations.fr: La montre n'est plus sous garantie.
translations.it: L'orologio non è più in garanzia.
translations.zh-Hans: 这只手表已不在保修期内。
translations.yue: 呢隻錶已經唔喺保養期內。
translations.pt: O relógio não está mais na garantia.
translations.vi: Chiếc đồng hồ không còn bảo hành nữa.
translations.nl: Het horloge valt niet meer onder de garantie.
translations.hi: घड़ी अब वारंटी में नहीं है.
translations.pl: Zegarek nie jest już na gwarancji.
translations.el: Το ρολόι δεν καλύπτεται πλέον από εγγύηση.
translations.nb: Klokka er ikke lenger under garanti.
translations.sv: Klockan har inte längre någon garanti.
translations.ro: Ceasul nu mai este în garanție.
translations.da: Uret er ikke længere under garanti.
translations.ja: この時計はもう保証対象外です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, determines 'Uhr' (subject).
Noun; feminine singular; subject.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; main verb expressing possession.
Negative determiner; agrees with 'Garantie'; negates the noun phrase.
Noun; feminine singular; direct object of 'hat'.
Negative polarity adverb; reinforces that the state no longer holds ('no longer').

en: The warranty is still valid for two years.
